contents.text: I found some great Italian restaurants in Seattle for you!

2. **Spice Haven** - Indian cuisine, rated 4.7/5, located at 456 Oak Ave, Seattle
3. **Green Leaf** - Vegetarian cuisine, rated 4.3/5, located at 789 Elm Rd, Seattle
